channel.title: Index on Alex Hartford's homepage
channel.description: Recent content in Index on Alex Hartford's homepage

item.title: Aphorisms
item.description: Aphorisms Little ideas and thoughts Writer’s Block Writer’s block seems to be mostly caused by intimidation, either self-imposed or resistance-wise. But what is really at the root? What stops a person from doing anything which they ostensibly want to do? Pride seems likely, or fear of failure. Perhaps it’s self-criticism, or some other mechanism. But these aren’t the real culprit. Those are the manufactured justifications. At bottom, it stems from a lack of real desire.

item.title: I Like This Thing
item.description: I Like This Thing Short little reviews of things I like! Everyday Shooter | By Jonathan Mak This is a game with a feeling, an essence, a philosophy, and a clear passion. Reviewed 5/18/2024 Hosono House | By Haruomi Hosono Low-key-est album ever. I want to learn how Hosono produces music. It’s always the most low-volume stuff ever, but it still feels full. His instruments are so simple, and he makes such good stuff out of em.

item.title: Ideas
item.description: Ideas I Like This Thing | Reviews of things that I like. Mostly games, music, films, and a few talks / essays. Aphorisms | Short ideas.

item.title: Music
item.description: My Music I put the best songs I write here! The newest stuff is up top. I made most of these songs using Logic Pro on a Mac Mini and an Akai MPK 249. ojii (December 2023) gate (December 2023) sloppy nachos (October 2023) jumbo (October 2023) the short worm (October 2023) lonely guy (July 2023) sunken ship (with June Ricks) (July 2023) testing (with Emelia Hartford) (July 2023) minute (2023) chapter (2023) apartment (2023) tired (2023) lofi (2022) mohican (2022) overworld (2022) Marginalia These are some improvisational ideas, inspired by Masakatsu Takagi’s Marginalia.

item.title: Now
item.description: What I’m doing now (my now page) Working at Nintendo, on graphics and tools. Helping to test the platform layer, graphics tools, and various other things. Designing a game which feels like Mamoru Oshii’s Angel’s Egg. This is a small project, and it might start out as a short film. My sister Mia’s doing the art, and we’ll probably work together on the music. Implementing 3D Graphics effects in my own engine, written in Jai.
